name: Calculadora de Área de Rectángulo
desc: Calcula el área, perímetro y diagonal de un rectángulo.
description: Calcula el área, perímetro y diagonal de un rectángulo.
seo_description: Calcula el área, perímetro y diagonal de un rectángulo. Introduce largo y ancho y obtén el resultado al instante..
example_label: Calculate área and perimeter of a rectangular room measuring 8.75m by 4.25m for flooring estimation
result_context: The area_m² ({area_m2}) is the total surface for materials like flooring; perimetro ({perimetro_m}) helps estimate baseboards; diagonal ({diagonal_m}) verifies square corners.
formula_display: Área = Largo × Ancho | Perimeter = 2 × (Largo + Ancho) | Diagonal = √(Largo² + Ancho²)

steps.description: Results: 37.19 m² area, 26 m perimeter, 9.74 m diagonal

mistakes: Mixing different units (e.g., meters and centimeters) without conversion
Using diagonal fórmula incorrectly by not squaring both sides first
Forgetting to add waste factor when ordering materials based on area
